stories.headline: Pentagon raises Israel's counterintelligence threat level to critical over espionage on US-Iran talks

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: NBC News is reporting that the Pentagon has now listed Israel as a TOP national security threat facing the United States! This is a HUGE development of historic proportions.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The Pentagon has raised its counterintelligence threat level for Israel amid concerns about eavesdropping on U.S.-Iran talks.

stories.headline: Elon Musk urges passage of Save America Act to protect democracy

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: BREAKING: Elon Musk just told his 240 MILLIONS Followers that the only way to Save Democracy is to pass the Save America Act

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Most of the FISA judges are federal judges from outside of DC, and we’re talking about warrants for the FBI to search the databases, not the Secretary of War… unless the Secretary of War is targeting America citizens… is there something you want to tell us?

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: How about you going fuck yourself Joey. Say that to my face if you ever see me in person you weak ass lightweight.

stories.headline: Bernie Sanders slams Netanyahu and Congress for hiding Israel military aid in Pentagon deals

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Netanyahu knows Americans are sick of funding Israel’s wars. So now he’s working with Congress to hide military aid inside Pentagon co-production deals. That means MORE U.S. tax dollars for Israel, with even LESS oversight. Not gonna happen!

stories.headline: AI investment surge creates market pressure but boosts Bitcoin case.
stories.body: The AI buildout is absorbing capital at historic scale, creating temporary pressure across global markets. That does not weaken Bitcoin. It strengthens the case for scarce, liquid, digital capital. Bitcoin remains the premier asset for the long term. $BTC

stories.headline: Bitcoin long-term chart shows broken uptrend and potential head-and-shoulders top
stories.body: Look at this long-term Bitcoin chart. The uptrend off the Dec. 2022 low is broken. There's a huge head-and-shoulders top forming. The most likely resolution is a retest of the longer-term uptrend off the Dec. 2018 low. If it holds, that puts a bottom between $25,000 and $27,000.

stories.body: After a dayslong search, the body of the American student who went missing during a family vacation in Japan has been found outside Kyoto. https://www.cnn.com/2026/06/06/us/james-weston-higginbotham-found-dead?Date=20260606&Profile=CNN&utm_content=1780760929&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: Border czar Tom Homan visits ICE facility for lunch
stories.body: "I was told the food was bad, so I sat in the cafeteria right along with the detainees." Border czar Tom Homan says he made a surprise lunch visit to an ICE detention facility after hearing complaints about the food. He says he had spaghetti and meat sauce, green beans, rolls and butter, and a fruit drink, but skipped the cake for dessert. "I couldn't finish it all," he said during an interview with @LaraLeaTrump.

Devon is a world champion arm wrestler, 16 year veteran of JTF2 - Canada’s tier 1 special operations unit, and an all around unique and very interesting guy.  
 Our podcast is out now on @spotify and everywhere else.

stories.headline: Andrew Huberman discusses risks and benefits of peptides and GLP medications.
stories.body: True that exogenous stuff (GLP & other peptides, creatine, etc) is far second to solid health behaviors. But their synergy is real. That is NOT to say there are no risks. My podcast always covers the up and downsides. The GLPs erased needle-phobia & now the floodgates are open…

stories.headline: Andrew Huberman comments on peptide episode discussion and balanced coverage.
stories.body: It’s going to be interesting to see how people pull specific clips to wage arguments for or against specific peptides, but for those that listen to this entire episode, @AbudBakri provided the most thorough and balanced public coverage of peptides to date… by a huge margin.

stories.headline: Terence Tao says AI can't ask truly new questions yet.
stories.body:
Terence Tao has read more math than almost anyone alive and uses AI daily.
He still says it can't ask a question nobody has asked before.
Not "can't yet." Can't.
A Fields Medalist on the line between recall and discovery: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?sub_confirmation=1&v=iOzi9_YakyE&feature=youtu.be

stories.headline: Yorba Linda California Temple milestone for local Latter-day Saints
stories.body:
Yorba Linda California Temple marks a significant milestone for local Latter-day Saints
After an effort to save a piece of Church land, members of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in southern California now rejoice at the Yorba Linda California Temple in their midst.

stories.headline: Thomas Massie comments on conspiracy theorists being right about NDAA
stories.body:
Thomas Massie says the conspiracy theorists were right again about Section 224 of the NDAA, which he says will merge the United States military with the IDF.
Massie says the provision is treasonous and warns that it will force the United States to compromise its own security for Benjamin Netanyahu's demands.
"The difference between a conspiracy theory in Washington has been reduced from six months to six days."
